diagrams.title: Stack Operation During INT and IRET
diagrams.description: Shows how the stack grows when INT instruction is executed and how IRET restores it
elements: IRET pops in reverse order: IP→CS→FLAGS
diagrams.purpose: Understand stack management in interrupt handling

diagrams.title: Interrupt Vector Table Structure
diagrams.description: Memory layout of IVT showing 256 entries, each containing CS:IP pair
elements: Each entry 4 bytes: lower word IP, higher word CS
Entry n at n×4 to n×4+3
diagrams.purpose: Visualize IVT organization and address calculation

diagrams.title: INT Instruction Execution Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flow of operations when INT n is executed
diagrams.purpose: Understand complete execution sequence of INT instruction
